properties.query: INSERT INTO enrollment (village_id, user_id, status, applied_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, NOW())

SELECT e.enrollment_id, e.village_id, e.user_id, u.username, e.status, e.applied_at FROM enrollment e JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.user_id WHERE e.village_id = ? AND e.status = 'WAITING' ORDER BY e.applied_at ASC

SELECT e.enrollment_id, e.village_id, e.user_id, u.username, e.status, e.applied_at FROM enrollment e JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.user_id WHERE e.village_id = ? AND e.status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY e.applied_at ASC
SELECT e.enrollment_id, e.village_id, e.user_id, u.username, e.status, e.applied_at FROM enrollment e JOIN users u ON e.user_id = u.user_id WHERE e.village_id = ? AND e.enrollment_id = ?
UPDATE enrollment SET status = 'APPROVED' WHERE village_id = ? AND enrollment_id = ?
UPDATE enrollment SET status = 'REJECTED' WHERE village_id = ? AND enrollment_id = ?
UPDATE enrollment SET status = 'EXPELLED' WHERE village_id = ? AND enrollment_id = ?
